seo.title: PublicSelf — try outfits, poses, and polish on your own photos
seo.description: Upload face and body references, explore formal and casual outfits, run a controlled AI photoshoot with poses you pick, then tune or swap details—plus LinkedIn-ready exports when you want them.

hero.title: Experiment with how you look on camera, without a real shoot.
hero.description: Start from your photos, explore outfits and scenes, direct poses like a mini studio, then refine with tune and item tweaks. When you land on a shot you like, export it in a quality that works for LinkedIn, your website, or your portfolio.
hero.ctaHint: Free generations to try it out
hero.imageAlt: A composed portrait on a dark background: calm presence, tailored look, and creative styling
slogans: Outfit, pose, and setting, guided so it still feels like you.
Same person, new outfit, new pose, guided instead of random.
Tune the shot you like instead of starting from scratch every time.

featureCards.title: Create outfit
featureCards.body: Start from your references and shape a look that still feels like you.

featureCards.title: Create photoshoot in a new outfit
featureCards.body: Run a shoot with poses, framing, and scenes you choose.

featureCards.title: Adjust, download, or upscale
featureCards.body: Fine-tune a shot you like, then export or upscale what you want to keep.

slides.caption: Prepare your references, then explore outfits, poses, and polish in the shoot workspace.

gallery.title: See what you can create
gallery.description: A mix of sample directions—outfits, poses, and polish. When the studio has shared examples to highlight, they appear here automatically.

items.title: Headshot polish
items.body: Clean framing when you want something professional without booking a photographer.

items.title: Outfit exploration
items.body: Test how different clothes read on camera before you commit to a look.

items.title: Pose variants
items.body: Same identity, different posture and energy—useful for profiles and creative shots.

items.title: Outdoor & location
items.body: Change the scene while keeping recognition and proportions believable.

items.title: Casual vs formal
items.body: Compare tones side by side instead of guessing from one static headshot.

items.title: Refined exports
items.body: When you are happy, download something you can use on LinkedIn or your portfolio.

pricing.title: Ready to try credits in the studio?
pricing.description: Same packs and prices as inside the app. Pick a pack here, then sign in on the studio to complete checkout securely.

plans.label: Starter
plans.name: PublicSelf Starter
plans.body: Enough to try several outfits and poses, compare results, and keep a first batch of downloads.

plans.label: Studio
plans.name: PublicSelf Studio
plans.body: More room to iterate—extra poses, more tune passes, and more keepers without topping up as often.

sections.title: Build your look from reference photos
sections.subtitle: Face and body context
sections.body: Upload the references the studio asks for so outfits, proportions, and likeness stay grounded. Save a look when one direction feels right so you can reuse it later.

sections.title: Run the studio like a photoshoot
sections.subtitle: Poses, crops, and scenes you choose
sections.body: Direct the session: poses, framing, and backgrounds that match how you want to appear online. Iterate until something feels usable—not just the first generation.

sections.title: Tune, swap, and export
sections.subtitle: Refine instead of reinventing
sections.body: When a pose is close, tune details or swap pieces. Download what you want to keep; treat LinkedIn-ready output as one outcome among many, not the whole story.
